news.headline: Fed's Schmid: The last stage to 2% inflation could be the most challenging for monetary policy.
Fed's Schmid: The Fed won't likely get to 2% inflation until 2026.
Nick Szabo, a Cypherpunk, has been appointed as the chief scientist of Samson Mow's JAN3 team. Mow expressed excitement about Nick joining them to boost Bitcoin's global adoption.
news.summary: Mow expressed pride in welcoming Nick to the Jan3 team as they intensify efforts to speed up the worldwide acceptance of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Lowell Observatory scientists to present new planet formation insights at AAS245 in Maryland. 3,000+ astronomers attending.
news.summary: A team of scientists from the Lowell Observatory in Arizona will be participating in the American Astronomical Society's AAS245 conference in Maryland from January 12 to 16, 2025. This event will bring together over 3,000 astronomers making it the largest yearly gathering of astronomers in the country.

news.headline: Delos Insurance Solutions CEO Kevin Stein expresses sympathy for those affected in southern California wildfires. Call for media interviews.
news.summary: The CEO of Delos Insurance Solutions, Kevin Stein, is open for media interviews. In a recent statement on January 9, 2025, he expressed condolences to those impacted by a tragic event in Southern California. He mentioned that multiple factors have contributed to these unfortunate incidents. For further information and discussions, CEO Kevin Stein is accessible for interviews.

news.headline: DHL Supply Chain acquires Inmar Supply Chain Solutions, becoming largest reverse logistics provider in NA with 14 centers and 800 associates.
news.summary: In Westerville, Ohio, DHL Supply Chain, a top provider of contract logistics in the Americas, has revealed the purchase of Inmar Supply Chain Solutions, a segment of Inmar Intelligence specializing in retail e-commerce returns. This move positions DHL Supply Chain as the primary provider of reverse logistics solutions in North America. The acquisition includes 14 return centers and approximately 800 associates who will now be part of DHL Supply Chain.

news.headline: Investors seek rebound in Netflix stock ahead of Q4 earnings announcement, expected later this month.
news.summary: As the company prepares to release its Q4 earnings later this month, investors are optimistic about a potential rise in Netflix stock. The post highlights the positive fundamentals that are supporting the stock, fueling expectations for a strong performance in the upcoming announcement.

news.headline: RTX stock hits record high, showing improving technical performance with a Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Will it continue?
news.summary: RTX recently received an upgrade in Relative Strength Rating, indicating improved technical performance. The stock hit a record high recently and investors are wondering if it can achieve the same feat again.

news.headline: BARDA and PTx collaborate to improve sepsis care with LEUKINE® (rhu GM-CSF) development, announced Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Lexington, Massachusetts, on January 9, 2025, Partner Therapeutics, Inc. revealed a partnership with the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA). BARDA operates under the Administration for Strategic Preparedness and Response within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.

news.headline: China's after-school tutoring market set to increase by $130.8 billion from 2025-2029, driven by outcome-based education and AI.
news.summary: In a recent report detailing the influence of AI on market shifts, it has been projected that the after-school tutoring industry in China is expected to expand significantly, with an estimated increase of USD 130.8 billion anticipated within the time frame of 2025 to 2029. The projected growth rate for the market stands at a nearly 18.3% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) during this period.

news.headline: Anchor Bolt & Supply in West Texas partners with Birmingham Fastener to enhance quality and service for customers.
news.summary: Odessa, Texas-based Anchor Bolt & Supply, a reputable provider of top-notch fasteners and industrial hardware in the Permian Basin for 69 years, has revealed a new partnership with Birmingham Fastener. Birmingham Fastener, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of American-made fasteners, has joined forces with Anchor Bolt & Supply to enhance offerings for clients in West Texas. This collaboration aims to improve quality, service, and inventory for customers in the region. Co-owned by Paul Anderson and Kyle Anderson, Anchor Bolt & Supply looks forward to the opportunities this partnership will bring.

news.headline: The hearing for Trump pick Bessent expected on January 16 - Politico.
Sanofi's Sarclisa subcutaneous formulation shows efficacy in late-stage multiple myeloma trial. Key endpoints met.
news.summary: Sanofi SA (NASDAQ:SNY) recently shared findings from the IRAKLIA phase 3 study, comparing the effectiveness of Sarclisa (isatuximab) in subcutaneous form via on-body delivery system (OBDS) against intravenous Sarclisa in combination with pomalidomide and dexamethasone (Pd) for adult patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. The trial confirmed that Sarclisa SC with Pd met the co-primary goals of non-inferior objective response rate and observed concentration before dosing. Key secondary endpoints included... For further details, the full article can be accessed on a reputable financial news website.

news.headline: RBC partners with Cohere to develop AI solution for finance. Creating North for Banking platform. Details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The Royal Bank of Canada, listed on the NYSE as RY, recently announced a collaboration with Cohere to develop a generative AI solution specifically designed for financial services. Cohere, known for its emphasis on security and privacy in enterprise AI, will join forces with RBC to build a secure generative AI platform named North for Banking. This platform will incorporate the unique models of both RBC and Cohere, as well as integrate with RBC's internal systems. This partnership signifies a significant move towards advanced AI adoption in the financial sector.

news.headline: Enphase Energy introduces IQ8P Microinverters in Latin America with 480 W peak output for solar installations. Expanding in Colombia, Panama, and Costa Rica.
news.summary: Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) has announced its expansion in Latin America by introducing the IQ8P Microinverters. These microinverters offer a peak output of 480 W, targeting residential and commercial solar installations in countries like Colombia, Panama, and Costa Rica. Enphase is collaborating with installers and distributors throughout Latin America, with recent launches of the IQ8 Microinverters in the Caribbean and continued operations in Brazil, Puerto Rico, and Mexico. This move signifies the company's strategic growth in the region, tapping into the rising demand for solar energy solutions.

news.headline: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals settles patent case with Teva Pharmaceuticals; generic Firdapse not marketed in US before Feb 25, 2035.
news.summary: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:CPRX) reached a settlement with Teva Pharmaceuticals Industries Ltd (NYSE:TEVA) regarding their patent litigation over Firdapse (amifampridine) 10 mg tablets. The agreement stipulates that if the FDA approves Teva's Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for a generic version of Firdapse, Teva will not launch it in the US before February 25, 2035, barring certain specific circumstances. This deal effectively ends all current patent disputes between the two companies.

news.headline: Johnson & Johnson halts US Varipulse procedures for safety review, as FDA approved Varipulse Platform for Atrial Fibrillation.
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) recently announced a temporary halt to all U.S. cases utilizing its Varipulse pulsed field ablation (PFA) system. PFA is a non-thermal technique employing high-amplitude electrical pulses to address cardiac arrhythmias and tumors. The FDA greenlit the Varipulse Platform in November for treating drug-refractory paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation (AFib). The VARIPULSE Platform streamlines AFib treatment by integrating PFA therapy and advanced mapping into a single device. Concurrently, healthcare expenditures in the U.S. have surged, reaching $5 trillion in 2023, influenced significantly by rising costs of obesity and diabetes medications and hospital services. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BP signs deal with India's ONGC as a Technical Services Provider for Mumbai High Field, expected to receive fixed fee for 2 years and performance-based fee for 10 years.
news.summary: BP p.l.c. (NYSE:BP) is partnering with India’s ONGC as their Technical Services Provider (TSP) to boost production from the Mumbai High Field. Shell and BP were involved in the pre-bid stage, with BP emerging as the final bidder. The deal involves a fixed fee for the first two years and a performance-based service fee tied to a portion of net incremental production revenue after cost recovery. The contract spans ten years, during which BP foresees a substantial production rise.

news.headline: Chevron begins oil production from Whale platform off US Gulf of Mexico. Peak production estimated at 100,000 boe/d. Shell owns 60% interest.
news.summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) has announced the start of oil production at the Whale semi-submersible platform in the deepwater U.S. Gulf of Mexico. The platform, situated in Alaminos Canyon Block 773 about 200 miles southwest of Houston, operates in over 8,600 feet of water. Chevron U.S.A. Inc., a subsidiary of Chevron, holds a 40% working interest in Whale, while Shell Offshore Inc. operates with a 60% stake. The company projects Whale's peak production to reach 100,000 gross barrels of oil equivalent per day, utilizing a potential of up to 15 wells. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: LDR Partners LP merges Universal Impact Technologies and ATI Group on Jan. 9, 2025, creating a strong partnership.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in New Holland, a strategic merger was completed between Universal Impact Technologies, Inc. (“UIT”) and ATI Group LLC, formerly known as ATI Corporation, by LDR Partners LP (“LDR”). This merger has united two top brands in the industry, creating a new entity known as Hurricane.

news.headline: Cushman & Wakefield expands Atlanta team with three new brokers for Office Agency Leasing.
news.summary: Cushman & Wakefield has recently expanded its Office Agency Leasing team in Atlanta by welcoming Stephen Clifton, Zach Wooten, and Payton Maxheimer. This addition bolsters the firm's capabilities in the region, highlighting its commitment to growth and excellence in the commercial real estate sector. The new team members bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the table, further enhancing Cushman & Wakefield's ability to serve clients effectively. This strategic move aims to capitalize on the thriving commercial real estate market in Atlanta and strengthen the firm's position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Arctic air boosts US heating demand, driving up natural gas prices at $3.71/MMBtu. Rain and snow expected in Northwest.
news.summary: A surge in arctic air sweeping across the United States has led to increased heating demand and unstable conditions in energy markets. Natural gas futures experienced a rebound on Thursday morning, with February contracts rising by more than 2% to $3.71 per million British units. According to the National Weather Center (NWC), the northwestern U.S. is expected to experience periods of heavy coastal rains and higher elevation snow. The NWC also warned of potential flash flooding in some areas as a result of the heavy rainfall. Over the next two days, the Northwest region is anticipated to receive a substantial amount of rain and snow, particularly targeting the northern California coast and Oregon. Full details of this story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Klick Health named world's most-awarded agency by AdvertisingHealth. Tops 2024 World Top 10 list.
news.summary: Klick Health has started the year 2025 on a positive note by securing the top spot on the 2024 AdvertisingHealth World Top 10 list. The list was revealed today, showcasing the company's notable achievement in the advertising industry.

news.headline: Sky Quarry Inc. advises shareholders to transfer shares to cash accounts for stability and accurate growth reflection. 182 characters.
news.summary: In Utah's Woods Cross on January 9, 2025, Sky Quarry Inc. (NASDAQ: SKYQ), a leading energy solutions firm focusing on transforming the waste asphalt shingle recycling sector, communicated a message emphasizing its dedication to implementing a strategic business agenda and enhancing shareholder worth. The company advised shareholders to transition their shares from margin to cash accounts for a more dependable and precise representation of Sky Quarry's growth path and market essentials.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia leads global coral reef conservation as ICRI Secretariat for 14th term, focusing on innovative financing and AI monitoring.
news.summary: Saudi Arabia has taken on the Secretariat role of the International Coral Reef Initiative (ICRI) for its 14th term in efforts to safeguard coral reefs globally. This initiative highlights innovative approaches such as financing mechanisms and AI monitoring to protect these vital marine ecosystems. The move underscores the urgency, with coral reefs facing significant threats, including climate change and overfishing. By leading the ICRI, Saudi Arabia is driving international collaboration to address these challenges and protect the approximately 25% of marine species that rely on coral reefs for survival. This development signifies a crucial step in preserving coral reefs, which support billions of dollars in economic activity and livelihoods worldwide.

news.headline: Griffin Asset Management partners with Hedgeye Asset Management to introduce Full Cycle Investment Strategy.
news.summary: In a recent development on January 9, 2025, Griffin Asset Management announced a new strategic collaboration with Hedgeye Asset Management (HAM) to introduce the Full Cycle Investment Strategy. This long only separately managed account strategy will focus on executing trades on ETFs and stocks, guided by a detailed investment approach. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of Griffin Asset Management and HAM to enhance investment opportunities for clients. The Full Cycle Investment Strategy is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the market and provide potential benefits for investors seeking innovative financial solutions.

news.headline: The Emily Program launches 2025 Learn with Emily webinar series to tackle eating disorder stigma; aims at consumers, healthcare providers.
news.summary: A national leader in eating disorder treatment, The Emily Program, based in St. Paul, Minnesota, has unveiled its 2025 Learn with Emily webinar series. This year-long program offers comprehensive understanding of eating disorders and mental health issues, with expert speakers covering various topics. The initiative targets consumers and healthcare providers alike, aiming to raise awareness and provide education on these complex issues. The program focuses on breaking the stigma surrounding eating disorders and mental health, emphasizing the importance of education in addressing these challenges.

news.headline: TUMS partners with DraftKings to launch TUMS Fantasy Foodball Pool with $40,000 cash prize. Fans can draft food picks.
news.summary: Ahead of the highly anticipated football event, fans have the chance to select their favorite food and drinks for a shot at winning a portion of a $40,000 cash prize pool. A recent survey by TUMS highlighted that 1 in 4 viewers are excited for the upcoming game. The survey results were released from Warren, N.J. on Jan. 9, 2025.

news.headline: Keener Management to manage The Taylor at 525 Apartments in Houston, formerly Clear Lake NASA, a 110-unit community at 525 Bay Area Blvd, reinforcing its presence in Clear Lake/Bay Area. Close to NASA, located near I-45, and other employers.
news.summary: Houston-based Keener Management has recently been selected to oversee the management of The Taylor at 525 Apartments, formerly recognized as Clear Lake NASA Apartments. This property consists of 110 units and is situated at 525 Bay Area Boulevard in Houston, Texas. The decision to entrust Keener with this responsibility enhances their prominent position in the Clear Lake/Bay Area vicinity. Conveniently located near I-45 and Bay Area Blvd, The Taylor at 525 Apartments is within a short distance of NASA/Space Center Houston and several local businesses. William H's connection is also nearby, making the property especially appealing to residents.

news.headline: Coresight Research & NextRivet partner for CoreRivet, offering insights & tech for retail & real estate execs.
news.summary: In New York, Coresight Research and NextRivet have teamed up to introduce CoreRivet, a new strategic partnership aimed at providing retail and real estate professionals with innovative solutions. This collaboration brings together Coresight Research's expertise in retail and technology with NextRivet's specialization in digital innovation for retail real estate. CoreRivet offers executives access to actionable insights and advanced technologies that can boost sales, streamline operations, and enhance customer experience. This partnership is set to revolutionize the industry by delivering cutting-edge strategies for growth and efficiency.

news.headline: IVX Health expands in Chicago with 4 new infusion centers, now has 9 locations in the area.
news.summary: IVX Health, a leading provider of outpatient infusion and injection centers, revealed plans for expanding its presence in Chicago on January 9, 2025. The company will be launching four additional infusion centers in Chicago to add to its current count of five centers in the greater Chicago area.

news.headline: Nayya predicts biggest healthcare challenges for 2025 in new report. New York, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Nayya, a prominent platform for benefits personalization and engagement, has released insights on their key areas of focus and the major challenges that the healthcare industry is predicted to encounter by 2025. Revealed in New York on January 9, 2025, Nayya anticipates a pivotal year ahead marked by numerous opportunities for growth and enhancement within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Fed's Bowman: Bank regulators should adopt a more pragmatic approach to policymaking.
Fed's Bowman: The December interest rate cut should be the last.
Fed's Bowman: New leadership at banking agencies expected to translate into shift in regulatory priorities and approach.
Fed's Bowman: Inflation concerns may partly explain the rise in the 10-year Treasury yield.
Fed's Bowman: I see greater risks to price stability, though deterioration in labor market conditions possible.
Fed's Bowman: Pent-up demand following election could pose inflationary risks.
Fed's Bowman: The coming months should bring clarity on incoming administration's policies, inflationary pressures.
Fed's Bowman: I prefer a cautious and gradual approach to adjusting policy.
Fed's Bowman: Inflation elevated, and I see upside risks, progress has stalled.
Fed's Bowman: Inflation is elevated and I see upside risks; progress has stalled.
Westwood One will broadcast NFL Wild Card Weekend with live play-by-play coverage as the Official Audio Partner of the NFL
news.summary: Westwood One, the NFL's Official Audio Partner, provides live play-by-play coverage of the NFL Wild Card Weekend. With exclusive access to all the action, Westwood One delivers thrilling updates and commentary to fans throughout the weekend. Stay tuned to catch all the excitement of the games as they unfold. Don't miss out on the immersive experience brought to you by Westwood One, the ultimate destination for NFL enthusiasts.

news.headline: Fed's Bowman: The current stance of policy may not be as restrictive as others may see it.
Fed's Bowman: We should refrain from prejudging incoming administration's future policies.
Colorado's wolf introduction program faces health risks and legal violations with non-native gray wolves testing positive for unknown diseases.
news.summary: Today, the Colorado Conservation Alliance, Inc. (CCA) based in Grand Junction, shared new information regarding the state's wolf introduction initiative. They reported that non-native gray wolves, a key component of this program, have tested positive for certain conditions, raising concerns among the public. The specific numbers related to this issue were not disclosed in the statement. This update underscores the growing apprehension surrounding the wolf release in Colorado.

news.headline: Drayage services market set to increase by $2.46B (2025-2029) due to manufacturing industry growth and AI influence.
news.summary: As per a recent report utilizing AI technology, the global drayage services sector is projected to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 2.46 billion anticipated between 2025 and 2029. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that during this period, the market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) exceeding 1.8%.

news.headline: Fed's Schmid: I'm fairly optimistic inflation will continue declining.
Fed’s Schmid: I am optimistic inflation pressures will continue to abate.
Fed’s Schmid: I am optimistic over growth, hiring prospects.
